name: Baldwin Brookman Park
description: Baldwin Brookman Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brunswick, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Blythe Island Ball Park
description: Come play pickleball at Blythe Island Ball Park in Brunswick, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Frederica Golf Club
description: Frederica Golf Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint Simons Island, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Golden Isles YMCA
description: Golden Isles YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brunswick, GA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

description: Come play pickleball at North Glynn Recreation Complex in Brunswick, GA! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. name: Northwood Estates
description: Northwood Estates is a place to play pickleball in Brunswick, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Retreat Tennis and Pickleball Center
description:
To access courts you must be staying at the Sea Island Resort, a member of Sea Island, or be accompanied by a member of Sea Island.  

Private pickleball lessons and clinics are available to non-resort guests.
fees: Private — $50 per Court per Hou. rMust be staying at the Sea Island Resort. $30 guest fee per player Must be accompanied by a member of Sea Island

name: The Club
description: Come play pickleball at The Club in Saint Simons Island, GA! There are 3 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, locker rooms, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.
